author: Ameen Hassan
summary: Single-question session. User asked how to score RFP eligibility. Claude recommended a two-tier approach: hard gates (pass/fail mandatory criteria) first, then weighted scoring second. No implementation work was done. Session ended immediately after the response.
problems: How to score RFP eligibility accurately and efficiently
approaches: Two-tier scoring model: hard gates (pass/fail) for mandatory eligibility criteria, followed by weighted scoring for ranked evaluation
results: Recommendation given: check mandatory eligibility criteria as binary pass/fail before applying any weighted scoring rubric
open_questions: What specific RFP is being scored?
What weights or criteria should be used in the weighted scoring tier?
Is this for rfp_intelligence_pro or a grant-specific workflow?
